author: studio notes
body: Video pilot — Sydney / Hall of Echoes. Direction: render in the 3rd / glitch style (Glitchcore Porcelain). Same hall is fine, but every shot is a DIFFERENT angle — wide drift, over-the-shoulder, extreme macro on the mask-crack, low-angle as the corruption spreads, reflection-POV for the Warden. Same angle twice is boring. The glitch should escalate like a screensaver mid-crash and then snap back to pristine pastel when the leash holds.

author: studio notes
body: Workflow note: video is the FINAL step, after approving the glitch storyboard. '🎬 Make video' composes the shot-list into one short clip in the approved style, with moving camera and changing shots (no static locked frame).
